description: Mack spends time with his brother Ruben at their family home, working on bikes and trying to connect while dealing with Ruben's frustration over his job loss. The mood is interrupted when a news report about the Watchdogs' attack on an ATCU facility catches their attention, and Mack receives a call from Coulson summoning him for an urgent S.H.I.E.L.D. assignment. Mack reluctantly prepares to leave family time behind for duty.

transcript.line: Sure that's the right move, Alfie?
Ah, you know what's not the right move? Calling me Alfie. Mom gets to. You don't. If you're gonna ride this thing like a damn maniac, I wouldn't have to come home and repair it for you.
You wish you rode like me.
Yeah, please. You got nothing to ride without that intake valve I brought you. I could always take it back.
Okay. Well, your Ironhead's in great shape, and you're never home to ride it anyway. Maybe I ought to...
Never ride my bike ever? Yeah, I love that idea.
I mean, I thought you were gonna finally ride it when we drove to Baja. Baja.
Oh, this again. Look, I told you, I got buried in work. All right, I'm sorry, but, uh... we'll find a time.
Oh, I understand. Being an insurance-company drone is super interesting. Why not bury yourself in that work?
Funny. I was wishing I was back at work right now.
Seems like a pretty sweet gig if it gets you a hook-up on an impossible-to-find intake valve.

Yeah, honestly, job hasn't been great lately. Management's out of control, new people keep coming in every day, no experience. And the two friends I was closest to, they just got, uh... transferred for good.
Work buddies, come and go. Now, family, they're the ones you can't get rid of. Even if they set up a roadside stand and tried selling you off to strangers.
You were an awkward kid.
I'm sorry about your work.
I'm sorry about your layoff. But it's just a temporary setback.
Why is this still here? When Mom and Dad left you the house, they had to leave this, too?
Dad wouldn't let Mom take it. I put it up on eBay. Turns out, not as valuable as Mom thinks.
Okay, uh, so here's the plan. Uh, lunch, beers, finish up the bike. Good?
Good. I picked up a couple steaks.
No, you didn't. You gonna do your...?
Mm-hmm.
Aw, yeah.
You could take a run at that, you know, cooking. You're good. No, I'm serious. Not as good as I am with engines, but...
Oh, that was almost a compliment. So close.
Breaking news...
I've thought about it, but...
We have a shocking video that was sent to our station minutes ago.

This facility s controlled by the ATCU. The government is keeping secrets, things we don't know until cities fall out of the sky. The Avengers, more like them every day, protected, hidden. Not anymore! We want this information released...
Whoa.
A list of who they are, where they are. Or you will have war on your hands. We are the Watchdogs. You will obey. Let's go!
This is...
Awesome. Right?
I need an agent in South Bend, and you're the closest one to the scene.
Right. It's just, I'm here with my brother, and I was hoping this week off would be more of a...
Thing is, Mack, I'm actually down a couple of agents right now.
I know, sir.
My resources are limited. Local P.D.'s already on the scene, and you know the Feds are on a plane.
Yes, but...
They'll pick the site clean, and we'll have nothing. They hit the ATCU, Mack. It's serious. I'm sorry about family time, but we all make sacrifices. Figure it out.
Hey, uh... So, it looks like I have to take off for a couple of hours. There was an accident on U.S. 41. I got to go assess it.
Now?
Yeah. It's complicated.
But this is simple. Lunch, beers, bike? Remember?
We'll get to it. I promise.
